Avorix Cook App

Step by Step to a Perfect Kitchen

The Avorix Cook App guides your kitchen team through every recipe — precisely, visually, and in real time. Consistent quality, no matter who's at the stove.

Request a Demo

How the Cook App Works

1

Choose a Recipe

The kitchen team selects the desired dish from the digital recipe library — on a tablet or smartphone, directly in the kitchen.

2

Step-by-Step Guidance

Each step is displayed clearly and intuitively — with quantities, timings, and photos. No room for interpretation, no mistakes.

3

Consistent Results

The dish turns out to standard — regardless of the cook's experience level. Quality becomes reproducible.

Feature Overview

Digital Recipe Library

All recipes managed centrally, always up to date and accessible to the entire team.

Portion Calculator

Automatic scaling to the required number of portions — no manual calculations, no waste.

Food Cost Tracking

Transparent cost control through recipe-based costing and food cost analysis.

Offline-Capable

The app works even without a stable internet connection — reliable in every kitchen situation.

Discover the Cook App

Book a free demo and see how the Avorix Cook App transforms your kitchen operations.

Request a Demo

Software and processes for consistent kitchen quality in hospitality.

Legal Notice Privacy Policy

Cookies for anonymous statistics
We use Google Analytics to understand how our website is used. The data is anonymized. You can decline and the website will work without any restrictions. Details: Privacy policy
